channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cycle lights, 11th July
item.description:
These are permanently red. They never change for me and I’ve just watched two cyclists and they didn’t change for them. Faulty sensor?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lanes, Palmers Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Play equipment, 11th July
item.description:
Play the equipment in the park is broken and will cause injury if not addressed. Broken equipment is also attracting vandalism and needs to be addressed. This is a busy play park and especially now in the summer needs fixing. It’s has been like this for a long time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 24 inch diameter deep pothole in middle of junction, 11th July
item.description:
Large pothole at junction of Camden Mews and York Way. It’s been there for months and I can see was reported on here months ago with no result. It is a hazard to cars, cyclists and pedestrians (I am all three) and an accident waiting to happen. Please fix!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 229a, Camden Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sand on the turn, bikes fallen down, 11th July
item.description:
Kids are falling down on this turn as some one left a lot of sand and its slippery. I just dont have brush to clean it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): William Cory Promenade, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped trollies, 11th July
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Way, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 11th July
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Way, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 137 Iverson Road, 11th July
item.description:
Medium sized brach has partially snapped off and is in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166-184, Iverson Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard come out of ground, 11th July
item.description:
I think a vehicle has collided with a bollard right outside Greenland Pier on Rope Street and needs refixing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Angelina house Bell Garden, 11th July
item.description:
We found the refrigerator in front of angelina house. Can you fix it.it’s waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-16, Wentworth Crescent, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boo bike next to children’s playground, 11th July
item.description:
Voi bike abandoned in Cator Park next to path circling children’s playground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish / recyvle box and bin dumped, 11th July
item.description:
Rubbish / recyvle box and bin have dumped on a small green area - which has been prone to fly tipping. It has been like this for about 3- 4 months. It looks disgusting and is attracting flies / foxes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbine Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge leak, 11th July
item.description:
Water continuously bursting out through curb cracks, it’s been going on the whole day for at least the past 4 hours, possibly longer. It’s flooding the entire road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish again dumped.Usually collected but not for tgree weeks, 11th July
item.description:
I have e reported this many times and sometimes will be collected other times left for weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chorleywood Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bin vandalised, 11th July
item.description:
It's been partly knocked over lifting the paving slab and now the doors been removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass growing from drain, 11th July
item.description:
Grass growing from this drain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere towards Brondesbury villas, 11th July
item.description:
Bagged waste clothes etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Hazelmwre towards Brondesbury on tree verge, 11th July
item.description:
Dog poo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain covered!!! Since 2014, 11th July
item.description:
Saw a metal plate on the road today, upon investigation on google maps it’s covering a road drain…… since 2014!!! How is that possible? Needs replacing and resolving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bikes and Lime bikes at Lennard Road / Kent House Road crossing, 11th July
item.description:
Multiple Forest and Lime bikes left on pavement at this crossing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and arms chair, 11th July
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayow Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
